title: Multipack: Caves
description: Modifies worldgen by adding new underground structures, cave types, and items
body:
**Resourcepack requirement**\
This data pack requires the same resource pack from "Multipack: Enhanced Vanilla", so if you have that resource pack you don't need to download the one included for this data pack.

This data pack enhances cave generation by adding 5 new cave biomes, several underground structures, and new items. **This data pack is not compatable with other data packs that add biomes** 

## New Caves
**Ice Caves:**\
In these caves of ice and snow you'll be able to find strays and slightly more lapis and diamonds but much less redstone.

**Jungle Caves:**\
Jungles are ideal conditions for cave spiders to live and the same is true for these overgrown caves covered in mud. You'll also find more iron here than other biomes.

**Sandstone Caves:**\
Nearer the surface these caves will be made of sandstone but as you go deeper you'll see red sandstone and terracotta. You'll have more luck finding gold and redstone in these caves.

**Slime Caves:**\
Slimes will take residence in these caves and spawn under normal mob-spawning conditions. These caves can be distinguished through chucks of slime and mossy cobblestone in the walls.

**Magmatic Caves:**\
You can find these rare caves at deep and fiery depths. You'll find scorching lava and magma, skeletons with flaming arrows, and Magmatic Zombies who have acclimated the the heat. If you can tough out the danger you'll be rewarded with greater quantites of diamonds, coal, and redstone.

## New Structures
**Dungeons:**\
Improved version of the vanilla box dungeon. It has more randomized variety and improved loot and also comes in ice, jungle, desert, and magmatic types.

**Skeleton Fort:**\
A small underground fort where skeletons spawn. Also comes in ice and jungle varieties.

**Spider Nest:**\
An underground nest of spiders and cobwebs. It contains loot but be careful around the spider eggs which can hatch into cave spiders.

## New Items
These new items can be found in the loot of the new structures.

**Throwable Water:**
Sold by wandering traders. Can be thrown by player or dispenser and will place water where it lands.

**Item Magnet:**
Sold by wandering traders. When held, attracts items and arrows on the ground to the player.

**Flare Wand:**
Sold by wandering traders. Right click to place a temporary light source at long range. 

**Cloud Wand:**
Sold by wandering traders. Right click to place a cloud in front of you. Clouds levitate mobs and players and can be used to place blocks in mid-air.

**Potion of Luster:**
Sold by wandering traders. Drink to gain the Luster effect which will highlight surrounding ores with particles visible in darkness and which can permeate through blocks.
